visibilityRule.booleanFilter: (1 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6) OR (2 AND 3 AND 5 AND 6 ) OR (2 AND 7)
(1 OR 2 OR (4 AND 7)) AND 6 AND 3 AND 5 AND 8

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: Order changing is not Approved,if you want to change the order,please click the submit button

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: This order change is not sync sap,if you want to change this order,please click the sync button

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: This order is invalid,if you want to active this order,please click the sync button

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: Please fill in shipping address and other needed info
